html:
House Sweet is a noble House from either the stormlands or crownlands.

Sweet may also refer to:

  • Characters:
    • Alys Turnberry, a lady companion to Princess Saera Targaryen known as Sweetberry.
    • Benjen Stark, a King in the North known as Benjen the Sweet.
    • Donnel Hill, a member of the Night's Watch known as Sweet Donnel Hill.
    • Ellyn Ever Sweet, a legendary daughter of Garth Greenhand.
    • Rafford, a Mountain's men known as Raff the Sweetling.
    • Robert Arryn, the boy Lord of the Eyrie known as Sweetrobin.
    • Serenei of Lys, the final mistress of King Aegon IV Targaryen known as Sweet Serenei.
    • Steffon Frey, a member of House Frey known as Steffon the Sweet.
    • Sweets, a hermaphrodite slave.
  • Geography:
    • Sweet Lotus Vale, a river valley in the Summer Isles.
    • Sweetport Sound, the seat of House Sunglass.
    • Sweetsister, an island and the seat of House Borrell.
    • Sweetwillow, a place on the Green Fork.
  • Others:
    • Oh, Lay My Sweet Lass Down in the Grass, a love song.
    • Sweet Cersei, one of Cersei's dromonds in the royal fleet.
    • Sweetfoot, a horse owned by Ser Arlan of Pennytree then Ser Duncan the Tall.
    • Sweetrot, a disease from Sothoryos.
    • Sweetsleep, also known as sweetmilk, is a drug.
    • Sweetwater river, a large aqueduct in Braavos.
